hooks.prompt: The wiki hot cache may have been lost during compaction. If wiki operations are active this session, re-read hot.md from /Users/piercecohen/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/second-brain/hot.md to restore context. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: VAULT="/Users/piercecohen/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/second-brain" && cd "$VAULT" && [ -d .git ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(md|canvas)$' && echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: Wiki pages were modified this session. Update hot.md with a summary of what changed. Overwrite the file completely at '"$VAULT"'/hot.md. Keep under 500 words. Sections: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads.' || true
